title: How to Have Sex
posterAlt: How to Have Sex (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.
synopsis: Released in 2023, How to Have Sex is a drama film from United Kingdom and France. It carries a 6.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
